[DQC.US.0200.10700] A value of 5,553,000 is reported for the concept us-gaap:EmployeeRelatedLiabilitiesCurrentAndNoncurrent with the IncomeStatementLocationAxis. This element should not be used to represent an income statement location. Please remove the member from this fact or consider using a different element to represent the balance sheet location.
